description: Automated email communication triggered by enrollment lifecycle events. Admin configures templates and automation rules. SMS/WhatsApp deferred to Phase 2.

screens.description: Admin creates and edits email templates with variable placeholders

features.description: Create, edit, preview, and activate/deactivate email templates

requirements.description: Admin can create email templates with: subject line, body (rich text), and variable placeholders (e.g., {{parent_name}}, {{program_name}}, {{trial_date}}, {{payment_amount}})
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Templates can be saved with placeholders; preview mode shows sample data substituted into placeholders

requirements.description: System provides default templates for: lead received, trial confirmation, trial reminder, enrollment confirmation, payment reminder, class start reminder
requirements.acceptance_criteria: All 6 default templates exist on initial setup; admin can edit but not delete defaults

screens.description: Admin configures which templates are sent on which triggers

features.description: Map enrollment lifecycle events to email templates

requirements.description: Admin can configure automation rules mapping triggers to templates: lead created → lead received email, trial scheduled → trial confirmation, trial date approaching → trial reminder, enrollment completed → enrollment confirmation + payment instructions, payment overdue → payment reminder, class start approaching → class start reminder
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Each trigger has an assigned template; admin can enable/disable individual automations; disabled automations do not send emails

requirements.description: Admin can configure timing for time-based triggers: trial reminder (N hours before), payment overdue (N days after enrollment), class start reminder (N days before)
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Timing is configurable per trigger; default values are pre-set (24h for trial reminder, 3 days for payment overdue, 2 days for class start)

screens.description: Chronological log of all automated and manual communications sent

features.description: View all emails sent by the system with status and details

requirements.description: Log displays: recipient email, subject, template used, trigger event, sent timestamp, delivery status (sent, failed)
requirements.acceptance_criteria: All automated emails appear in the log; log is filterable by recipient, template, and status

requirements.description: Failed emails are flagged and admin is notified for manual follow-up
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Failed emails show 'Failed' status with error reason; admin sees a notification or badge for unsent communications

business_rules.rule: All automated emails use admin-configurable templates; no hardcoded email content
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Changing a template's content is reflected in the next email sent using that template

business_rules.rule: Each automation trigger sends at most one email per event occurrence (no duplicates)
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: If an event fires multiple times (e.g., enrollment re-submitted), only one email is sent per unique event

business_rules.rule: Admin can disable any automation without deleting the template or rule
business_rules.acceptance_criteria: Disabled automations show as 'inactive' in the automation rules screen; no emails are sent for disabled triggers
